REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER, SHEILA ANGSTENBERGER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE PER SE TO BE RE-ALLEGED AS PART OF OTHER TORT CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND - NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACHES OF IMPLIED COVENANTS - THESE CAUSES OF ACTION A PROPERLY ALLEGED AS SEPARATE AND DISTINCT FROM BREACH OF EXPRESS CONTRACTUAL PROVISIONS. DEMURRER TO THE HABITABILITY TORT CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED AS IT IS PROPERLY PLEAD IN THE ALTERNATIVE. DEMURRER TO RETALIATION AND MALICIOUS PROSECUTION CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED - THESE CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. DEMURRER TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT RE: WAIVER OF RENT IS OVERRULED - NOT DUPLICATIVE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER, SHEILA ANGSTENBERGER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for negligence per se to be re-alleged as part of other tort causes of action. Demurrer to the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is sustained without leave to amend - no substantive opposition. Demurrer is overruled as to the fourth and fifth causes of action for breaches of implied covenants - these causes of action a properly alleged as separate and distinct from breach of express contractual provisions. Demurrer to the habitability tort cause of action is overruled as it is properly plead in the alternative. Demurrer to retaliation and malicious prosecution causes of action is overruled - these causes of action is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to the breach of contract re: waiver of rent is overruled - not duplicative. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
